name: Roast Beef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Make dressing: Stir together all ingredients, except beef.
2. Slice beef as thinly as possible.
3. Place 1 layer of beef in the bottom of a rectangular Pyrex dish. Top with some of the dressing.
4. Keep alternating layers of beef and dressing, ending with the dressing. Cover with Saran wrap and chill for 12 hours.
5. Will keep in the fridge for up to 1 week.
